ko:
현재 저장 데이터(XP·크레딧·기술 레벨·코덱스·뱃지 등)가 모두 초기화됩니다.
되돌릴 수 없습니다.
en:
This will erase your current save (XP, Credit, Tech Level, Codex, Badges, etc).
This cannot be undone.
5× T3 shields to bypass stress aborts.
Unknown region — unlocked on first arrival
7 days of increased auto-launch rate cap.
Unlocks all premium rewards for Season 1.
